zh.lifeSummary: 當Margaret Redman於1528年12月14日出生在英國英格蘭貝德福爾諾迪爾時，她的父親Edwin Redman28歲，母親Lola Ann Wilhoit24歲。她於1544年6月6日與Sir John Trask Randell Sr.在英國英格蘭貝德福爾素爾結婚。他們至少是4個兒子的父母。她去世於1562年12月14日在英國英格蘭薩默塞特巴斯享年34歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Margaret Redman于1528年12月14日出生在英国英格兰貝德福爾諾迪爾时，她的父亲Edwin Redman28岁，母亲Lola Ann Wilhoit24岁。她于1544年6月6日与Sir John Trask Randell Sr.在英国英格兰貝德福爾素爾结婚。他们至少是4个儿子的父母。她去世于1562年12月14日在英国英格兰薩默塞特巴斯享年34岁。

nameMeanings.name: Redman
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: occupational name from Middle English red (Old English hrēod) ‘reed’ + -man, presumably for a thatcher or reed-cutter. Compare Reeder .
English: in southeastern England sometimes a topographic name perhaps for someone who lived by a clearing, from Middle English rede (Old English rēod, rȳd) ‘clearing’ + man.
English: habitational name from Redmain (Cumberland), from Old English rēad ‘red’ + an uncertain second element, perhaps a dialect form of man ‘cairn’.

variants.name: Reeder
meanings: English: occupational name for someone who used reeds as a roofing material (a thatcher), a derivative of Middle English rede ‘reed’ + -er. Compare Reed and Redman .

English: topographic name for someone who lived by a clearing, a derivative of Middle English rede, ride, rude ‘clearing’ (see Reed ) + -er, synonymous and interchangeable with atte Rede, atte Rude ‘at the clearing’. This type of name, composed of a topographic term + -er, is common in Kent, Surrey and Sussex, and it is also found in Essex.
Dutch and German: variant of   Reder   3.

variants.name: Redhead
meanings: nickname for someone with red hair, from Middle English red ‘red’ + he(ve)d ‘head’. Compare Redman .
habitational name from an unidentified place in northern England called Redhead, probably meaning ‘red headland’.

variants.name: Rodman
meanings: English: occupational name for a thatcher or reed-cutter, from Southwest Middle English rod(e), rud(e) (Old English hrēod) ‘reed’ + -man. Synonymous with Redman 1.
English: topographic name for someone who lived at a clearing, from Middle English rode (Old English rodu) or Southwest Middle English rude (Old English rȳde) ‘clearing’ + man. See Redman 2.
Americanized form of German Rodmann: variant of Rodemann (see Rodeman ).

nameMeanings.name: Margaret
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

variants.name: Margareta
meanings: From the Latin form of Greek Margarītēs. See Margaret .

variants.name: Margaretta
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

en.lifeSummary: When Margaret Redman was born on 14 December 1528, in Northill, Bedfordshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, Edwin Redman, was 28 and her mother, Lola Ann Wilhoit, was 24. She married Sir John Trask Randell Sr. on 6 June 1544, in Southill, Bedfordshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 4 sons. She died on 14 December 1562, in Bath, Somerset, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 34.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Margaret Redman est née le 14 décembre 1528, à Northill, Bedfordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Edwin Redman, avait 28 ans et sa mère, Lola Ann Wilhoit, avait 24 ans. Elle a épousé Sir John Trask Randell Sr. le 6 juin 1544, à Southill, Bedfordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils. Elle est décédée le 14 décembre 1562, à Bath, Somerset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 34 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Margaret Redman am 14. Dezember 1528 in Northill, Bedfordshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Edwin Redman 28 und ihre Mutter Lola Ann Wilhoit 24. Sie hat am 6. Juni 1544 in Southill, Bedfordshire, England, United Kingdom Sir John Trask Randell Sr. geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne. Sie starb am 14. Dezember 1562 im Alter von 34 Jahren in Bath, Somerset, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Margaret Redman è nata il il 14 dicembre 1528 nel Northill, Bedfordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, Edwin Redman, aveva 28 anni e sua madre, Lola Ann Wilhoit, aveva 24 anni. Lei sposato Sir John Trask Randell Sr. il 6 giugno 1544, nel Southill, Bedfordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli. Morì il 14 dicembre 1562, nel Bath, Somerset, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 34 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Margaret Redmanが1528年12月14日にイギリスイギリスベドフォードシュアイアノースイルで生まれた時，父Edwin Redmanは28歳，母Lola Ann Wilhoitは24歳であった。1544年6月6日にイギリスイギリスベドフォードシュアイアソウスイルでSir John Trask Randell Sr.と結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子の親であった。彼女は1562年12月14日にイギリスイギリスソメルセトバスで34歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Margaret Redman(이)가 1528년 12월 14일 영국 잉글랜드 베드퍼드실르 노르스이에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Edwin Redman(은)는 28세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Lola Ann Wilhoit(은)는 24세였다. 그녀는 1544년 6월 6일 영국 잉글랜드 베드퍼드실르 소우스이에서 Sir John Trask Randell Sr.(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1562년 12월 14일 영국 잉글랜드 서머세트 바스에서 34세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Margaret Redman родилась 14 декабря 1528 г. в местности нортилл, бедфордшир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Edwin Redman было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали Lola Ann Wilhoit, 24. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir John Trask Randell Sr. 6 июня 1544 г. в местности соутилл, бедфордшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына. Она умерла 14 декабря 1562 г. в местности бат, сомирсет, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 34 лет.
